title: Amy Oberg
compiled_truth: Amy Oberg is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-13 to 2001-06-14), Amy Oberg sent 8 and received 16 emails, totalling 24 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (7), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (5), [Marie Hejka](people/marie-hejka) (3), [Richard Causey](people/richard-causey) (2), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (2).
